headline: CULTURE YOU CAN PROVE
subheading: Build a pharma quality culture that survives MHRA inspection, leadership change and commercial pressure.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial conceptual illustration of an organisational quality culture as an invisible architecture: a luminous interconnected lattice of glowing nodes and clean lines rising from a polished brushed-stainless laboratory surface, suggesting shared behaviours and decisions held together as a system. At the centre, a softly radiant geometric core symbolising integrity and trust, with delicate ascending data threads and rising signal markers evoking measured indicators and honest reporting. Faint out-of-focus laboratory glassware silhouettes and a laminar-flow grid pattern dissolve into the background, hinting at a pharmaceutical environment without literal detail. Cool deep navy backdrop with teal and cyan illumination tracing the lattice, accented by a single subtle fresh-green glow at the core. Calm, premium, clinical-luxury mood, layered depth, soft volumetric haze, refined and trustworthy. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
